title: Revised Guidelines on EIA Thresholds (MC 2014-005)
description: Memorandum Circular revising the thresholds for projects requiring Environmental Impact Assessment under the Philippine EIS System.

title: Water Quality Guidelines and General Effluent Standards (DAO 2016-08)
description: DENR Administrative Order setting water quality guidelines and general effluent standards for Philippine water bodies.

title: Air Quality Monitoring Guidelines (DMC 2005-013)
description: Department Memorandum Circular on air quality monitoring guidelines for stationary sources under the Clean Air Act.
